summary: Anonymous user AppleTV+ scheduled/live - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN the user is anonymous
AND there is a AppleTV+ Game scheduled/in-progress
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MASTepg

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the AppleTV+ game tile
steps.result:
THEN video feed buttons are not displayed
AND a message displays letting the user know where the game can be watched

**AppleTV+ message:**
Watch on Apple TV+
This broadcast is available to watch only on Apple TV+. Open the Apple TV app to watch now or download for your streaming device. Archives will be available 90 minutes after the end of the game. Live audio is available on MLB.TV. For more information visit http://mlb.tv/appletvplus
